alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs at Google Devices; experience with contractual/compliance complexity in regulated environments
alignments.job_requirement: Navigate complex contractual and regulatory quality requirements, translate them into practical quality plans

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German speaker, professional English fluency; extensive experience engaging global stakeholders and formal interfaces at Google
alignments.job_requirement: Communicate with precision and confidence in both English and German; engage with multicultural teams and formal customer interfaces

alignments.candidate_evidence: Demonstrated ability managing complex cross-functional transformation programs and operational scaling at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Manage competing priorities across QMS and programme workstreams; navigate ambiguity without losing focus

gaps.gap: No aerospace, defence, or regulated-industry quality assurance background. Candidate background is commercial operations and transformation, not quality systems or compliance function.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate could transition into QA function if willing to undergo formal EN 9100, AQAP, and audit training; however, this would require significant domain ramp-up in a mission-critical role.

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience with EN 9100, ISO 9001, AQAP 2110/2210/2310, quality management systems, or audit planning/execution.
gaps.mitigation: Could acquire these through structured training and mentorship, but role requires hands-on competency from day one in a regulated defence context.

gaps.gap: No software development assurance, SDLC quality embedding, or software-intensive programme quality oversight experience.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has transformation and program leadership skills, not deep software quality or development assurance expertise.

gaps.gap: Role is specialist quality function; candidate is generalist strategy and operations leader. Function mismatch, not just seniority or domain gap.
gaps.mitigation: Would require fundamental career pivot from strategy/transformation to specialized quality engineering discipline.

output.summary: Strategy and operations leader with strong scope, bilingual fluency, and stakeholder management skills, but no aerospace/defence, quality systems, EN 9100/AQAP, development assurance, or QA function experience. Role requires specialist QA competency in a regulated defence context; candidate's background is commercial transformation, not quality engineering. High-severity function mismatch outweighs seniority alignment.
uncertainties: Unclear whether candidate has any exposure to quality management systems, auditing frameworks, or regulated-industry compliance as a secondary responsibility during transformation work
Unclear if candidate's 'transformation programs' included software-intensive initiatives with embedded quality or assurance oversight
Role level appears L4-L5 scope; unclear if this is a specialist IC track or manager-track, which affects seniority matching
